en: Hello, Mom! Hi!
Why do you guys look so down?
You said the season's over and you only did like two videos.
ko: 시즌 끝났고 영상 두 개밖에 안 했다며.

en: Did like three, at least.
Doesn't matter.
It's just with everything going on in the news right now, it's just things feel kind of bleak.
ko: 그냥 요즘 뉴스에서 벌어지는 일들 때문에, 좀 암울한 느낌이야.

en: Yeah, I just feel like the world is falling apart.
Hey, you know what you guys need?
A vacation! Vacation?
We have work.
It'll be expensive. Oh, shh.
Tickets are on me.
You ever flown first class before?
What do you say, boys? A little vacay?
♪ Mama, I've been wanting this my whole life. ♪
♪ First class ticket, watching recline.
ScarJo got the effin' vibe right. ♪
♪ Whole life feeling like a highlight. ♪
♪ Hasta luego to all of my haters. ♪
♪ Ballin' like Dwayne Wade, I'm one of the greatest. ♪
ko: ♪ Dwayne Wade처럼 볼린, 난 최고 중 하나 ♪

en: ♪ Flight attendant with a thick old thang. ♪
♪ Handing me drinks like Goof King. ♪
♪ If you ain't up on sign. ♪
♪ ScarJ is the name when you're dealing with planes. ♪ Whoo!
♪ Now listen up, I'm talking to you, jerk. ♪
♪ Ballin' in the sky all the way to Newark. ♪ Shh! Did you say Newark?
ko: ♪ Newark까지 하늘에서 즐겨 ♪ 쉿! Newark이라고 했어?

en: Yeah, why? What's up?
No, it's— We're landing at Newark?
Yeah, Newark.
In New Jersey.
Damn, it's kind of windy out there, huh?
ko: 와, 밖에 바람 좀 부는데, 그치?

en: Didn't we fly out of LaGuardia?
It's like a half-hour drive!
No, but this is awesome. Come on!
I mean, we're in first class, right? Ha ha!
♪ Now I'm up in first class, hittin' on a spritz fast. ♪
ko: ♪ 지금 퍼스트 클래스에서 칵테일 들이키는 중 ♪

en: ♪ I don't got time, so I wear a wristwatch. ♪
Is something going on at Newark?
Like, are there planes crashing there or something?
No, I think they're just like losing them.
Losing the planes? Yeah, like losing track. Yeah, right.
ko: 비행기를 놓친다고? 응, 추적을 못 하는 거야. 맞아.

en: They're losing the planes in Newark, but the crashing is happening like everywhere all the time now.
ko: Newark에서 비행기를 놓치고, 추락은 요즘 어디서든 계속 나고 있잖아.

en: Oh yeah.
Right.
Yeah. Are you not nervous?
♪ Bitch, I ain't scared of no plane. ♪
♪ I'm chillin' and I'm bringin' it on. ♪ Aah! Whoo! Whoo!
ko: ♪ 여유롭게 즐기는 중 ♪ 아야! 우! 우!

en: Yeah, just gonna sit down and buckle up.
Didn't like that at all.
Apologies for the turbulence, folks, but good news—
ko: 난기류에 죄송합니다, 승객 여러분, 좋은 소식은—

en: We've been cleared for landing at Newark.
At least I think so.
Haven't heard anything yet.
Oh no. Hmm.
That's not good.
Nah, that's scary.
Oh, the TV's just turned off.
Once we land, I should be good.
Once we land, I'll be all right.
I'm just gonna meditate too. God's got me.
God's always got me.
♪ I can't be alone with the thoughts in my dome. ♪
ko: ♪ 머릿속 생각이랑 혼자 있을 수 없어 ♪

en: ♪ Mark, do you have any shows in your phone? ♪
♪ The only show I have is Lost. ♪
♪ I only have the pilot of Lost. ♪
Why would you only have that one?
I didn't know I'd be here today!
Uh, bad news, folks.
We are what we call in the biz, "flying blind." Oh God!
Okay, be honest.
Do you think we'll make the article, at least? What?
Do you think the article will be like, "Scarlett Johansson and Please Don't Destroy die in plane crash"?
ko: 기사가 "스칼렛 요한슨과 Please Don't Destroy 비행기 사고로 사망" 이렇게 나올까?

en: Or just you?
What's Please Don't Destroy?
Who did you think we were?
Uh, pardon me while I give a quick call to our air traffic controller.
ko: 잠시 실례하고, 항공 관제사한테 전화 좀 할게요.

en: Come on, pick up, pick up, pick up, pick up.
Pick up! Hello? Hi!
Are you having fun up there?
No, I'm not having fun!
Sir, do you have our coordinates?
Uh, I don't know.
It's my first day. What?
It's your first day? Yeah.
There's like no one here.
Oh, fantastic!
Maybe you tell me—
Like, what color is your plane?
It's a freaking plane!
I'm gonna find the emergency exit, and I'm gonna jump!
Do not open the emergency exit! I've got to! I want to! Oh God. That's a new one. Uh-oh.
ko: 비상구 열지 마! 열어야 해! 열고 싶어! 세상에. 이건 처음이네. 이런.

en: Looks like this is it, guys.
Anything to get off your chests?
This might sound corny, but the only thing I regret is that Avengers didn't make more money at the box office. What?
ko: 유치하게 들릴 수 있지만, 유일한 후회는 어벤져스가 박스오피스에서 더 벌지 못한 거야. 뭐?

en: We are going down!
If anybody can help us, please, please!
I can't give up on them.
Yes! If I just—
Force their coordinates.
I'm starting to get my signal back and calculate their wind resistance.
ko: 신호가 돌아오기 시작했어. 바람 저항을 계산 중이야.

en: Hang on!
I see the runway!
I see the runway!
I think I'm doing a good job!
I think I'm saving them!
Oh my God! It's working! It's working!
♪ I can see you now, you're on the mainframe. ♪
♪ Now glide up, glide up, and land this plane. ♪
ko: ♪ 이제 올라가, 올라가, 이 비행기를 착륙시켜 ♪

en: Oh!
We did it!
Yes!
I'm so happy! Yes! Yeah!
Now we can finally enjoy our vacation in Newark.
ko: 드디어 Newark에서 휴가를 즐길 수 있어.

en: Oh! Oh! Oh! Yes!
You can do anything you put your mind to.
